Fig. 2. Two FTAs for input-output example 𝑒1 : {𝑥 = 0001} ↦→ 0110. A1 in Figure 2a uses an abstract domain that tracks the lowest bit for all bitvectors, and A2 in Figure 2b uses a finer-grained domain that tracks the lowest two bits. Each state is labeled with its associated abstract value, and the associated grammar symbol is shown on the far left.
